headline: Assessing Fox (FOXA) Valuation As Tubi’s New Ad Tools And Partnerships Gain Attention
summary: Tubi’s new ad tools and content tie-ups put Fox in focus Fox (FOXA) is back in the spotlight after its streaming platform Tubi announced new ad formats, measurement tools, and programming partnerships with Apple TV and TikTok at IAB NewFronts in New York. See our latest analysis for Fox. Despite the excitement around Tubi’s product and partnership announcements, Fox’s recent share price performance has been mixed. The 1-day share price return is 1.16% and the 90-day share price return...
